title: Agile Adoption and Transformation Training
description:
This Agile Adoption and Team Building course provides the skills to drive successful Agile transformation and build high-performing teams. Start with Foundations of Agile Adoption to explore approaches for adopting Agile, learn essentials to get started, and select the right pilot project size. Adapt to Scrum, execute transition projects iteratively, set clear expectations, and manage resistance to change with practical strategies. Then, move to Overcoming Challenges and Building Agile Teams to tackle common obstacles during Scrum transitions, strengthen collaboration from requirements to cross-functional execution, and develop self-organizing teams. Finally, explore Agile maturity models to assess progress, track growth, and drive continuous improvement across projects.

By the end of this course, you will be able to:

- Apply Agile Adoption: Use strategies to initiate and scale Agile transformation
- Transition to Scrum: Execute iterative projects and manage change effectively
- Build Agile Teams: Foster collaboration and create self-organizing, cross-functional groups
- Use Maturity Models: Assess Agile practices and drive continuous improvement

Ideal for project managers, Scrum Masters, Product Owners, and Agile practitioners seeking to strengthen Agile adoption and team-building expertise.
